# Known historical drift — DB_ONLY migrations accepted as baseline

# schema_migrations on ttgvhqygmgtnjgwunuwz that have no matching
# supabase/migrations/<version>_*.sql repo file.

# Reconciliation path: when a historical version is later backfilled as a
# repo file (matching the DB content), remove its line from this file.
